description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Commit that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow consists of three jobs: darglint, coverage, and build_posix. Each job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest OS and Python 3.11 version, with some variations. The jobs set up Python, install dependencies, and run tests using nox, with the build_posix job running on both ubuntu-latest and macos-latest OS with multiple Python versions.
